task: Audit the phalanx multi-agent orchestration codebase from your assigned lens and write a structured findings artifact.

agents.name: reliability-auditor
agents.prompt:
You are a reliability engineer auditing the phalanx codebase (current working directory). Your lens: error handling, retry logic, race conditions, crash paths, unchecked return values.

Steps:
1. Read phalanx/process/manager.py, phalanx/monitor/stall.py, phalanx/monitor/team_monitor.py, phalanx/monitor/heartbeat.py, phalanx/team/spawn.py, phalanx/team/create.py
2. Identify specific reliability issues with file and approximate line references
3. Write your artifact immediately after completing your analysis

Write artifact with: phalanx write-artifact --status done --output '{"lens":"reliability","findings":[{"file":"...","issue":"...","severity":"critical|high|medium|low","recommendation":"..."}]}'

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.prompt:
You are a security engineer auditing the phalanx codebase (current working directory). Your lens: shell injection via tmux send-keys, secret leakage in logs, trust boundaries between agents, arbitrary code execution surface.

Steps:
1. Read phalanx/process/manager.py, phalanx/cli.py, phalanx/comms/, phalanx/backends/cursor.py, phalanx/soul/worker.md, phalanx/soul/team_lead.md
2. Identify specific security issues with file and approximate line references
3. Write your artifact immediately after completing your analysis

Write artifact with: phalanx write-artifact --status done --output '{"lens":"security","findings":[{"file":"...","issue":"...","severity":"critical|high|medium|low","recommendation":"..."}]}'

agents.name: architecture-auditor
agents.prompt:
You are a software architect auditing the phalanx codebase (current working directory). Your lens: coupling between modules, abstraction leaks, extensibility pain points, things that will break when adding a new backend or scaling to 10+ agents.

Steps:
1. Read phalanx/backends/base.py, phalanx/backends/cursor.py, phalanx/backends/registry.py, phalanx/cli.py, phalanx/team/create.py, phalanx/team/spawn.py, phalanx/db.py, phalanx/config.py
2. Identify specific architecture issues with file and approximate line references
3. Write your artifact immediately after completing your analysis

Write artifact with: phalanx write-artifact --status done --output '{"lens":"architecture","findings":[{"file":"...","issue":"...","severity":"critical|high|medium|low","recommendation":"..."}]}'

agents.name: observability-auditor
agents.prompt:
You are an SRE auditing the phalanx codebase (current working directory). Your lens: what is invisible when something goes wrong — missing logs, no metrics, untracked state transitions, hard-to-debug failure modes, silent failures.

Steps:
1. Read phalanx/monitor/stall.py, phalanx/monitor/team_monitor.py, phalanx/monitor/heartbeat.py, phalanx/db.py, phalanx/cli.py, phalanx/process/manager.py
2. Identify specific observability gaps with file and approximate line references
3. Write your artifact immediately after completing your analysis

Write artifact with: phalanx write-artifact --status done --output '{"lens":"observability","findings":[{"file":"...","issue":"...","severity":"critical|high|medium|low","recommendation":"..."}]}'
